scripts.build: doppler run -- pnpm exec vite build
scripts.deploy: doppler run --project ingress-proxy --config prd -- pnpm alchemy:up
scripts.test:e2e: node -e "if (!process.env.INGRESS_PROXY_BASE_URL) { console.error('INGRESS_PROXY_BASE_URL is required for ingress-proxy e2e tests'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:preview: node -e "if (!process.env.INGRESS_PROXY_BASE_URL) { console.error('INGRESS_PROXY_BASE_URL is required for ingress-proxy e2e tests'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest run --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts ./e2e/vitest/management.e2e.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: node -e "if (!process.env.INGRESS_PROXY_BASE_URL) { console.error('INGRESS_PROXY_BASE_URL is required for ingress-proxy e2e tests'); process.exit(1); }" && vitest --config ./e2e/vitest.config.ts
scripts.destroy: doppler run --project ingress-proxy --config prd -- pnpm alchemy:down
scripts.db:rebuild: rm -f .local.db && sqlite3 .local.db '' && find sql/migrations -name '*.sql' -print | sort | while read -r file; do sqlite3 .local.db < "$file"; done && sqlite3 .local.db '.schema --indent' > sql/schema.sql
